name: No witnesses to my Chicago lawyer using Google AI Overview wrong—can I still sue?
description: Yes, use filings/AI logs as evidence.[2]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my Chicago lawyer using Google AI Overview wrong—can I still sue?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use filings/AI logs as evidence.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, circumstantial evidence like filings with hallucinations, AI logs, and expert opinion on standard practice suffice, as in Mata v. Avianca where fakes were proven.[2] Factors: digital trails strong. Courts infer negligence from errors. Bolster with bar complaints.
